review.note: Refs: Wikipedia, MamaLisa, MorganLibrary. Title, opening lyric identity, and common Missouri Waltz version verified. The candidate starts directly at the expected lullaby opening and keeps a source-derived 90 BPM. Lyrics still come from sidecar text rather than embedded XML lyric tags.Issues: sidecar-lyrics-source | source-bpm-kept-90.
